In the south-east are situated Kosala, Kaliitga, Vaftga, Upa-

Urdhvakan^has (high-necked ones), the island of Vrsa, Nalikera-
dvipa (the Cocoa-nut Island), Garmadvipa, the inhabitants of the

(long-necked ones), Kiskindha, Kantakasthala, the territory of the
Nisadas (aborigines), the Purikas, Dasarna, the naked Sabaras and
Parna-^abaras (those wearing leaves). All these places come under
the jurisdiction of the triad beginning with Asle§a,

[The Kosala country has been already assigned to the east.
Here it is placed in the south-east as well. This means that its
territorial boundaries extended from the east to the south-east
considerably.
